description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named pr that triggers on push to branches named pull-request/[0-9]+. The workflow has a concurrency group that cancels in-progress jobs. It consists of multiple jobs: pr-builder, checks, conda-cpp-build, conda-cpp-tests, conda-python-build, and conda-python-tests. The pr-builder job depends on the completion of the other jobs and uses a shared workflow from rapidsai. The other jobs also use shared workflows with specific configurations for building and testing conda packages for C++ and Python.
